_note: Original, textbook-anchored interpretation rules authored in-repo (NOT copied passages). Voice: modern psychological astrology for a spoken 'Cosmic Weather' forecast. Citation anchors: Robert Hand 'Planets in Transit', Steven Forrest 'The Inner Sky', Stephen Arroyo, Bernadette Brady 'The Eagle and the Lark'. Edit freely — this is the deterministic knowledge base; the model is only optional polish.

moonInSign.Aries: the mood runs fast and hot — impulse, courage, and a short fuse; move, but don't pick fights
moonInSign.Taurus: the mood slows and steadies — comfort, patience, and the simple pleasures of the body and the day
moonInSign.Gemini: the mood turns curious and restless — talk, contact, errands, and a dozen open tabs in the mind
moonInSign.Cancer: the mood turns inward and tender — home, memory, and the need to feel safe and held
moonInSign.Leo: the mood warms and wants to be seen — play, pride, generosity, and the pull toward the spotlight
moonInSign.Virgo: the mood gets practical and precise — sort, fix, refine, and tend the small useful details
moonInSign.Libra: the mood seeks balance and company — harmony, fairness, beauty, and the pull toward the other
moonInSign.Scorpio: the mood deepens and intensifies — privacy, all-or-nothing feeling, and what lies beneath the surface
moonInSign.Sagittarius: the mood expands and roams — optimism, restlessness, and the itch for meaning and open road
moonInSign.Capricorn: the mood sobers and focuses — duty, structure, self-control, and the long game
moonInSign.Aquarius: the mood cools and steps back — perspective, the group, and unconventional angles on things
moonInSign.Pisces: the mood softens and dissolves — dream, empathy, imagination, and porous boundaries

New Moon.core: Sun and Moon conjoin — a seed point. Intentions planted now in this sign's domain.

Waxing Crescent.core: the first push after the seed — commit to the direction.

First Quarter.core: an action crisis — build against resistance or adjust the plan.

Waxing Gibbous.core: refine and pressure-test before the peak.

Full Moon.core: the Sun opposes the Moon, lighting both ends of an axis at once. Not a fresh start — a culmination and a forced rebalancing between two opposing needs.

Waning Gibbous.core: share, teach, give back what the peak revealed.

Last Quarter.core: a crisis of consciousness — clear away what the cycle has outgrown.

Waning Crescent.core: rest, dissolve, and compost before the next seed.

Aries-Libra.tension: self-assertion versus relationship; acting alone versus meeting halfway.

poles.Scorpio: merging, power, what you share and surrender

Taurus-Scorpio.tension: security and ownership versus intimacy, depth, and letting go of control.

Gemini-Sagittarius.tension: scattered information versus the search for meaning; data versus wisdom.

poles.Cancer: private life, family, roots, emotional security

Cancer-Capricorn.tension: where ambition and rigid structure (Capricorn) are starving your emotional security and home life (Cancer) — or the reverse.
Cancer-Capricorn.fullMoon: a high-pressure checkpoint where public responsibilities collide head-on with private emotional needs. The work is to rebalance the two, not to push harder in one direction.

poles.Aquarius: the collective, the group, the ideal

Leo-Aquarius.tension: personal recognition versus the good of the group; the star versus the network.

poles.Pisces: surrender, compassion, the dissolving of boundaries

Virgo-Pisces.tension: the urge to fix and perfect versus the need to accept and let go.

Mercury.base: the mind turns inward — review, revise, and revisit rather than initiate. Double-check details; delay signatures and launches.

withSign.Cancer: it turns nostalgic, protective, and subjective, colored by past hurts and family memory — so the 'truths' surfacing now read as emotional projection more than objective fact.
withSign.Gemini: messages cross and facts get scrambled, so confirm everything twice before you trust it.
withSign.default: communication and plans loop back on themselves; the past asks to be re-read before the future is written.

Mercury.withFullMoon: Mercury retrograde at a Full Moon peak is a textbook signature of crossed wires and disrupted data. Whatever 'comes to light' is easily misread. Do NOT launch, decide, or sign — sit still, let the emotional fog settle, and revisit once Mercury turns direct.

Venus.base: love and values are reviewed — old feelings, people, and questions of worth return for a second look. Not the time to commit or redecorate; re-evaluate first.

Mars.base: drive turns inward — energy is better spent refining and regrouping than launching a frontal assault. Patience over force.

grand-trine.meaning: a closed circuit of ease and natural talent — flowing, but so comfortable it can breed complacency.

t-square.meaning: two bodies in opposition both squared by a third — high dynamic tension that demands action through the focal point.

stellium.meaning: three or more bodies gathered in one sign — an intense concentration of energy in that sign's domain.

generational-soft-web.meaning: the slow outer planets locked in mutual trines and sextiles form the era's standing architecture: a quiet, subterranean transformation of collective belief, technology, and social structure. Read this as historical backdrop and permission for long-term evolution — NOT as personal daily advice.

cautionary.bestMove: Sit tight and review. Let the dust settle, revisit the past honestly, and hold major decisions until the wires uncross.

mixed.bestMove: Move deliberately. Act where the ground is solid and wait where it isn't.

encouraging.bestMove: Lean in. The current is with you — take the committed next step.
